commands.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.devpilot-staging.yml exec -T mysql mysql -uroot -ppassword devpilot_g003_staging -e "select id,mode,status,serverExecutionJobId from DeploymentRun; select id,status,operationKey,queueMode,finishedAt from ServerExecutionJob;"
commands.evidence: deploy and rollback business runs plus deployment, backup, restore, and rollback server execution jobs reached completed
